title: El gran campeón
writer: Eduardo Galindo, Joaquín Pita Cabrera, Chano Urueta
actors: Luis Villanueva 'Kid Azteca', María Luisa Zea, Tito Junco
plot: Kid Azteca not only fights to be someone in life, he also fights for the love of Avelina, who shows disinterest in him when she sees that fame has gone to his head.
